epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; clinical assessment with functional impairment

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to limited CBT access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often not formally diagnosed; symptoms may be framed as somatic
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT (exposure) and SSRIs; counseling and family support
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High stigma and limited CBT availability
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Affordable generic SSRIs and increasing telehealth availability for counseling
